dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4072 IS: Agricultural and Food Policy Research Centers Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schmitt introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To reauthorize Agricultural and Food Policy Research Centers.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Agricultural and Food Policy Research Centers Reauthorization Act of 2026.

section.header: Reauthorization of Agricultural and Food Policy Research Centers
section.text: Section 1419A(e) of the National Agricultural Research, Extension, and Teaching Policy Act of 1977 (7 U.S.C. 3155(e)) is amended by striking $10,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023 and inserting $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2027 through 2031.
